description: Basic HTML page structure with proper semantic elements (header, main, footer) to organize content logically and provide a foundation for the welcome page
steps: Load the welcome page in a browser
Inspect the DOM structure to verify header, main, and footer elements exist
Verify the page renders without console errors
Confirm the page has a proper DOCTYPE and HTML structure

description: Page title and meta tags that appear in browser tabs and search results, providing context about the welcome page and improving discoverability
steps: Open the welcome page in a browser
Check the browser tab displays a meaningful title
View page source and verify meta description tag exists
Verify meta viewport tag is present for responsive design

description: Prominent hero section at the top of the page with a welcoming headline and subheadline that immediately communicates the purpose and value to visitors
steps: Verify a large, prominent headline is visible above the fold
Confirm a supporting subheadline or description is present
Check that the hero section is visually distinct and eye-catching

description: Primary call-to-action button in the hero section that guides users to take the main desired action (e.g., Get Started, Sign Up, Learn More)
steps: Locate the primary CTA button in the hero section
Verify the button has clear, action-oriented text
Click the button and confirm it responds appropriately
Check that the button is visually prominent with contrasting colors
